title: 📰 Bitcoin clings to $76,200 support as 64% market odds favor $76K close
message: Bitcoin defends technical support near $76,200 as prediction markets price 64% odds the asset closes above $76,000 by 5pm EDT Friday.

title: 📰 April 2026 sets record: 30 hacks, $625M+ stolen as DPRK fingerprints dominate
message: Crypto's worst month for incidents in over a year saw roughly 30 separate exploits drain north of $625 million, led by Drift and KelpDAO.

title: 📰 TRM Labs: North Korea-linked hackers drove 76% of 2026 crypto thefts, $577M in 4 months
message: TRM Labs says DPRK-linked groups account for roughly 76% of all crypto theft losses in 2026, stealing about $577M in four months.

title: 📰 Western Union to launch USDPT, Solana-based stablecoin, this month to replace SWIFT internally
message: Western Union will roll out USDPT, a Solana-issued dollar stablecoin, in May to settle internal agent transfers and bypass SWIFT.

title: 📰 Aptos leads CoinDesk 20 with 4.4% pop as nearly all index assets rise
message: Why Aptos keeps showing up at the top of altcoin index moves — the canonical Move VM L1 deep-dive on throughput, institutional roadmap, and how APT lines up against Sui.

title: 📰 BTC closes worst April since 2022 but May seasonality flips bullish
message: How a defensive April close near $76K reads against historical May returns and post-halving cycle data — the safe-haven framing for choppy tape between FOMCs.

title: 📰 BTC, ETH, XRP slide as spot ETF outflows deepen heading into May
message: Multi-day spot-ETF outflow streaks across BTC, ETH and XRP into the May Fed window — institutional-positioning read versus the April-absorbed inflow base.

title: 📰 North Korea drove 76% of 2026 crypto theft, $6B stolen since 2017: TRM Labs
message: TRM Labs's 2026 attribution: DPRK-linked actors now drive 76% of stolen crypto this year and over $6B cumulatively since 2017 — the canonical Lazarus / OFAC guide.

title: 📰 Banks push to slow stablecoin law as Agora races for federal charter
message: US banks are lobbying to delay key stablecoin rules just as Agora pushes for a national bank charter under the GENIUS Act framework.

title: 📰 Aave Horizon RWA market hits $550M as tokenized Treasuries go live as collateral
message: How institutional Treasuries become on-chain collateral for stablecoin loans — the deep-dive on RWA tokenization and the cleanest TradFi-to-DeFi bridge yet.

title: 📰 April finishes worst crypto-hack month in over a year — $620M across 12 incidents
message: Drift's $285M and Kelp DAO's $292M dominate the haul — the canonical Lazarus / DPRK guide on the crew tied to ~76% of 2026 theft.

title: 📰 SEC-CFTC name BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, LINK as digital commodities in joint guidance
message: A joint SEC-CFTC interpretation establishes a token taxonomy that explicitly carves the top five names out of securities law.

title: 📰 100+ crypto firms push Senate to mark up CLARITY Act this session
message: Industry signs an open letter demanding a market-structure markup — the deep-dive on what CLARITY codifies and the path to law.

title: 📰 Bitcoin trading volume in freefall — pattern that rarely ends quietly
message: Why thinning BTC participation into FOMC tends to resolve into defensive regimes — how the safe-haven framing reads from here.

title: 📰 Banks lobby to slow GENIUS Act as Agora sprints for stablecoin charter
message: 60-day delay request meets Agora's federal-charter sprint — the deep-dive on the OCC framework, dual-track rules and what changes if rollout slips.

title: 📰 Lazarus owns April: $577M in two hits drives 76% of 2026 crypto theft
message: TRM Labs pins KelpDAO + Drift drains on the DPRK crew — TTPs, laundering paths and OFAC reach in the canonical Lazarus guide.

title: 📰 Wasabi Protocol drained for $4.5M after deployer admin-key compromise
message: Single-EOA admin key swapped vault contracts on Ethereum + Base — multisig deployers and timelocks close this exact attack path.

title: 📰 Wasabi Protocol drained for $4.5M after deployer admin key compromise
message: Attackers seized Wasabi's deployer key, swapped vault contracts to malicious versions, and drained roughly $4.5M across Ethereum and Base.

title: 📰 AllUnity ports MiCA-compliant EURAU euro stablecoin to Solana
message: DWS-backed AllUnity is taking EURAU multi-chain — the deep-dive on MiCA's EMT track and what licensed euro stablecoins mean for EU on-chain payments.

title: 📰 Bitcoin spot ETFs bleed third straight day at $138M; ether funds shed $88M
message: Three consecutive outflow days led by IBIT and FBTC undercut the April-absorbed-$1.7B framing — the institutional-flow guide on what it signals.

title: 🛠 ETF Tracker — live spot BTC + ETH flow board
message: Watching the third outflow day live? Our ETF tracker surfaces IBIT, FBTC and ETH spot flows so you can see the rotation in real time.

title: 📰 Iran-strike fears hammer crypto: BTC bottoms at $75.7K, ETH at $2.25K week lows
message: Reports of Trump weighing new Iran action sent BTC to its lowest open in a week as Brent crude spiked 7% — the safe-haven framing under a geopolitical shock.

title: 🛠 New tool: Stablecoin Charter Tracker (GENIUS Act issuer status)
message: Live status for who has filed for, received, or is exempt from a federal OCC trust charter under the GENIUS Act — Circle, Agora, Tether USA₮, Paxos, Ripple RLUSD and more.

title: 📰 Lazarus owns April: crypto hack toll crests $620M, 95% from one DPRK crew
message: April 2026 is the worst month for crypto theft since February 2025, with $620M+ drained across 12 incidents and Lazarus behind the two biggest.

title: 📰 GENIUS Act dual-track: $10B threshold splits issuers between state regimes and OCC
message: Treasury's stablecoin framework lets sub-$10B issuers opt into qualifying state regimes while $10B+ issuers move to OCC supervision — the deep-dive on the new classification map.

title: 📰 Banks ask Treasury to delay GENIUS Act 60 days as OCC framework lags
message: Banking groups are lobbying for stacked 60-day comment extensions on three GENIUS Act stablecoin rules — a successful delay drags issuer licensing into late 2026.

title: 📰 Pump.fun pivots to value capture: 50% of revenue, perpetual buyback-burn
message: After years of mercenary memecoin supply, Pump.fun's permanent buyback-and-burn is the most aggressive token-revenue alignment yet from a top-five Solana fee generator.

title: 📰 Pump.fun torches $370M of PUMP, sets new bar for memecoin tokenomics
message: Solana's top memecoin launchpad burned $370M of PUMP and locked in a 50% revenue buyback — the tokenomics deep-dive on what changed.

title: 📰 SEC-CFTC name BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, LINK as digital commodities
message: A joint SEC-CFTC interpretation lays out a unified token taxonomy and explicitly designates the five biggest assets as digital commodities.

title: 📰 Solana Alpenglow targets 150ms finality — 80x faster, votes move off-chain
message: SIMD-0326 rewires Solana consensus to cut block finality from ~12s to ~150ms by moving validator votes off-chain. The deep-dive on what changes for MEV and DEX UX.
